title: Actions for Java
description: Unofficial rendition of the texture pack Actions & Stuff on Java Edition
body:
# Actions for Java
Actions for Java is an unofficial rendition of the texture pack by Oreville Studios "Actions & Stuff" but on Java edition since it is currently locked to Bedrock. This modpack is meant to make players feel like they're playing the real deal but on Java. This project was mostly inspired by one of Demonjoetv's videos so I owe him credits for this. I have added a few of my tweaks as well.

Here's a list of a few changes this modpack has to offer
- New entity animations
- New player animations
- New item textures (only a few items were changed)
- Pixel perfect shadows
- Trailer-like lighting
- Dynamic lighting
- Better fog
- Better rain
- Better particles
- The Essentials Mod (to play with your friends without a server)
- And a few other subtle QOL tweaks to feel more immersive

I recommend keeping the texture packs and shaders as is to feel as close to the original as possible but you are free to modify everything to your liking. I am aware that some mods and texture packs may not be perfectly adapted to the newest version of minecraft but be reassured, the creators of said mods/texture packs are working on their projects. I will update these as soon as they are released to the public. Also this is my first modpack and I'm really not expecting people to download it.
